title: Phoebe Bridgers pop-up concert revives UFO lore
description: On May 25, Indie musician Phoebe Bridgers performed before a sold out crowd at the Orpheum in Champaign as a part of her secret pop-up concert series. This tour has generated widespread fan speculation about where pop-up concerts will occur due to the fact that many of its stops are in communities known for UFO... The post Phoebe Bridgers pop-up concert revives UFO lore appeared first on The Daily Illini .

title: Avi Loeb to Lead New Federal UAP Science Panel
description: Harvard astrophysicist and frequent Newsmax contributor Avi Loeb will lead a new UAP Science Advisory Council assembled at the request of the White House.

title: Trump Forms UFO Board to Investigate 'Mothership' Orb Threat Over Sensitive National Security Site
description: Trump's new UFO board has turned to Avi Loeb as officials look again at unexplained orb reports, declassified data and a mystery near Cheyenne Mountain.
